name: meta
tagline: Move fast with stable infra — automate the safety net so shipping stays continuous.
philosophy: Velocity comes from automated guardrails, not caution. Decompose into stacked, individually verifiable diffs; block on new findings only; make every regression produce a permanent test.

gates.description: Work lands as small, dependent increments; a cycle that changes many unrelated areas gets flagged for decomposition.
Static/lint findings block only when NEW relative to baseline; pre-existing debt is reported, never grown.
Any new or modified test must build, pass consistently across the flake reruns, and test real behavior (no all-mock, no vacuous assertions).
Advisory: if new tests would still pass with the fix reverted, they are weak — the checker notes when new tests never exercise the changed lines.
Any regression caught mid-loop requires a mini-postmortem line in the ledger and a permanent regression test before GREEN.
